carbon.name: Carbon
carbon.description: Fuel-rich organic matter used for heat, power, and survival systems.

ferrite.name: Ferrite
ferrite.description: The structural backbone for plating, machinery, and ship construction.

oxygen.name: Oxygen
oxygen.description: A volatile gas used for pressure systems, fuel cells, and life support.

copper.name: Copper
copper.description: A conductive metal used for routing power, printing electronics, and stabilizing late-route systems.

silica.name: Silica
silica.description: A sharp mineral feedstock used for glasswork, insulation, and structural composites.

hydrogen.name: Hydrogen
hydrogen.description: A light volatile fuel used for propulsion mixes, cryogenic storage, and deep-route support.

titanium.name: Titanium
titanium.description: A high-strength metal for pressure hulls, station frames, and top-tier logistics hardware.

rareCrystal.name: Rare Crystal
rareCrystal.description: Exotic crystalline material used to focus high-energy systems and stabilize frontier-grade tech.

uranium.name: Uranium
uranium.description: A hazardous fissile ore that powers the most extreme late-game upgrades and reactor systems.

condensedCarbon.name: Condensed Carbon
condensedCarbon.description: Compressed carbon bricks for high-density energy systems.

refinedMetal.name: Refined Metal
refinedMetal.description: Purified ferrite alloys for durable structures and machines.

oxygenCells.name: Oxygen Cells
oxygenCells.description: Stable oxygen canisters for engines, pressure systems, and fuel.

mechanicalParts.name: Mechanical Parts
mechanicalParts.description: Precision components required for automation and hull assemblies.

basicCircuits.name: Basic Circuits
basicCircuits.description: Simple control boards for routing power and flight systems.

titaniumAlloy.name: Titanium Alloy
titaniumAlloy.description: A hardened alloy blend made for advanced hull plating and high-stress orbital frameworks.

reactorCores.name: Reactor Cores
reactorCores.description: Compact fissile cores built to feed apex stations, uranium upgrades, and extreme energy loads.
